title: revert: switch DeepSeek and Kimi back to Fireworks
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Fireworks in the hive
gist.blurb: We've routed DeepSeek and Kimi back to Fireworks for rock-solid reliability. Enjoy smooth, uninterrupted chatting with your favorite models.
gist.summary: DeepSeek and Kimi text models have been routed back to the Fireworks provider to ensure high stability and success rates.
gist.impact: Users will experience significantly improved reliability and near-perfect uptime when generating text with DeepSeek and Kimi.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about switching the backend provider to 'Fireworks' for better reliability. Visual symbols: literal cozy fireworks, routing/cables, the bee mascot, the monitor robot. The bee and robot watching beautiful pixel fireworks represents the successful switch.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the chunky monitor-head robot sitting on a grassy hill watching soft pastel fireworks. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and dark purple (#110518) night sky gradient background. The bee wears tiny wizard glasses and the robot has happy square pixel eyes. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
